commands.review_summary:
The branch updates Control UI config editing to prefer source/resolved snapshots over runtime config, adds ConfigSnapshot fields, adds a provider-overlay regression test, and records the fix in the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. from source: current main edits and serializes the runtime `config` snapshot, while validation rejects a runtime-materialized empty provider `baseUrl` if it is submitted. I did not run a live browser repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: No separate repair lane is needed; this PR is already the active fix candidate and this pass found no blocking code defect.

target.title: fix(ui): preserve source config for Control UI saves
target.body:
## Summary
- Fix the Control UI config form to use the redacted source/resolved config snapshot for form editing and save serialization.
- Keep runtime config available on the snapshot for read-only UI surfaces, but do not let runtime defaults such as `models.providers.openai.baseUrl: ""` leak into `config.set`.
- Add a regression test covering a bundled provider overlay with `agentRuntime.id` and no authored `baseUrl`.

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/85831.

Credit: reported by @garyd9 in #85831.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/config.test.ts`
- `pnpm check:changed`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Saving Control UI form changes no longer persists runtime-materialized empty provider `baseUrl` values when the authored config omitted them.
Real environment tested: To be filled by executor after applying the patch.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/config.test.ts`; `pnpm check:changed`.
Evidence after fix: Regression test should show `config.set` raw payload keeps `models.providers.openai.agentRuntime.id` and omits `models.providers.openai.baseUrl` when only the runtime snapshot contains `baseUrl: ""`.
Observed result after fix: To be filled by executor after validation.
What was not tested: Manual browser save against a live gateway unless the executor runs an optional Control UI smoke.

ClawSweeper 🐠 replacement reef notes:
- Cluster: issue-openclaw-openclaw-85831
- Source PRs: none
- Credit: Source issue reported by @garyd9: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues/85831; Changelog entry may thank @garyd9 because this is a user-facing bug fix from an external reporter.
- Validation: node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/controllers/config.test.ts; pnpm check:changed
- Replacement reason: ClawSweeper could not update the source PR branch directly, so it opened a writable replacement PR instead.
